productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Max 90 Black Shoe
description: REVOLUTION COMES IN AIRY PACKAGESThe nike Air Max 90 is a retro running shoe engineered with a max Air unit in the heel for ultimate cushioning and comfort. Let’s rewind a wee bit to understand what’s so special about the nike Air Max 90.Nike created its revolutionary Air Sole unit for its footwear way back in the 1970s. A decade and a half later, around 1987, the Nike Air Max shoe debuted and it’s window in the heel became an instant hit. All of a sudden shoe wearers started feeling air sole comfort, or should we say started seeing such comfort in the heel. With this revolutionary shoe becoming such a hit worldover, Nike went on to create various models on these lines, and after much research was born the Nike Air Max 90.Uppers Meshed upper with synthetic leather uppers and ankle area is made of leather with enhanced breathability, durability, Fit and feel Laces that suit your feet with extra eyestays provides a customized lacing and ensures a supportive fit, keeping the feet snug, supported and stable Synthetic leather overlays along the edges of the shoe ensure high-quality detailing and add on a more streamlined silhouette and added support and durability to the upper Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Appliqued swoosh on the sides Appliqued brand names on the tongue and behind collar Midsole (PU) midsole  offering comfort, durability and support at its best Outsole Visible Max Air unit in the heel gives cushioning and protection against impact during heelstrike Outsole is made of rubber with a waffle pattern that enhances traction and durability Flex grooves created along the outsole flexes and bends naturally along with your foot, giving your strides a comfort feel Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
